name: @trailblaze/scripting
description: TypeScript SDK for authoring Trailblaze MCP tools — wraps @modelcontextprotocol/sdk with the Trailblaze `_meta.trailblaze` envelope reader and a `trailblaze.tool`/`trailblaze.run` authoring surface. Marked private while the SDK surface stabilizes: package.json `main` / `exports` / `types` point at `./src/index.ts` and the package has no build step. Authors consume via a TS-capable runtime (bun/tsx) through the `file:` link used by the sample-app example. Publishing to a registry (with a proper `dist/` build + `.js` / `.d.ts` outputs) is a follow-up — until that ships, `private: true` blocks accidental `npm publish`.
